decision_tree_applies.UC-100: Q3 partial (S3 multipart could be async if chunks fail mid-upload); Q4 partial (RQ-008 implied behavioral — accept/reject by size+MIME); LIKELY MANDATORY (long-running upload, recoverable across browser refresh per S3 multipart spec)
decision_tree_applies.UC-200: Q1 (queue/worker/job/async — BullMQ); Q2 (TranscriptionJob lifecycle states PENDING→PROCESSING→DONE/FAILED); Q3 (Deepgram async); Q4 (retry on failure); Q5 (depends on UC-100). MANDATORY × 5.
decision_tree_applies.UC-300: Q1 (queue/worker/async — BullMQ); Q2 (ProtocolGenerationJob lifecycle); Q3 (kie.ai async LLM call); Q4 (retry); Q5 (depends on UC-200). MANDATORY × 5.
decision_tree_applies.UC-302: Q1 weak (sync request → Puppeteer render → stream); Q4 (might retry on chromium crash). LIKELY OPTIONAL but recommended.

ADR-005_TUS_vs_code_S3_multipart.detail: Architectural decision in graph contradicts shipped code. ADR-005 must either be REVOKED+REPLACED (via new ADR) or the code must be reverted to TUS. Since TUS is gone, the spec needs to follow.

config_yaml_runtime_state_unmodeled.detail: config.yaml.deploy, config.yaml.vps, config.yaml.ci_platform all empty; reality = github-actions + transcriber.itsalt.ru + Caddy + pm2. config.yaml.graph.neo4j_bolt_port=3587 but .mcp.json + container = 3627.

production_node_version_drift.detail: deploy-production.yml runs `nvm use 20` on the prod server while ci.yml NODE_VERSION=22, .nvmrc=22, engines.node>=22. Latent runtime risk.

release_status_json_lies.detail: release-status.json claims merge/ci/health all skipped — every claim is contradicted by code (ci.yml exists; deploy-production.yml curls /api/health; merge happens via push-to-main with PRs #1..#4 historically). The lie matches the Project-Alpha 'clean across packages/shared, frontend, backend' postmortem shape.

wave_status_graph_vs_reality.detail: All six Wave nodes in graph at status: pending; reality = delivered (per conductor) and shipped (per release-status v0.2.0). status.json shows waves up to 10 (deployment), graph only has W0..W5.

UC_node_properties_required_by_strict_mo.detail: Every UseCase node lacks entrypoint_type, has_provider_dependency, is_release_gate_uc, runtime_contract. These properties are required predicates for G3/G7/G8/G4.

approved_unverified_pattern_terminal_sta.detail: Seven+ entries in status.json carry 'REVIEW APPLIED -- UNVERIFIED (100% test author overlap, operator override applied)' / 'UNVERIFIED (no live DB)' / 'UNVERIFIED (actionlint not available)'. These are the literal 'APPROVED -- UNVERIFIED' forbidden terminal success state listed in strict-mode-changes.md.
